title: senecio odontophyllus
intro: Senecio odontophyllus, also known as Tooth Leaf Ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues, due to its active compounds like sesquiterpene lactones and polyacetylenes. In herbal preparations, Senecio odontophyllus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity and side effects.
